title: Virtualization of CPU, Memory, and I/O Devices
description: A flowchart illustrating the layers of abstraction and control flow between hardware, hypervisor (VMM), and guest virtual machines.
relationships: Hypervisor abstracts and manages physical resources
Hypervisor allocates vCPUs, virtual memory, and virtual I/O to Guest VMs
Guest OS interacts with virtualized devices as if they were physical
Hypervisor translates and schedules VM requests to the physical hardware
